response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — key requirements for a CTO role in high-stakes AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time systems (e.g., DLang microservices, GISCollective)
Strong engineering culture advocacy through workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal mention of financial infrastructure, credit risk, working capital, or compliance frameworks critical to the role
